decisions.rationale: Backend math + frontend gauge + release engineering are tightly coupled; splitting would yield half-fixes that contradict each other

decisions.decision: Defer EVIDENCE-TALLY-01, RENDER-CLI-01, RENDER-PDF-01 to v5.0 Phase 01 (Stabilization)
decisions.rationale: Same bug class likely exists in CLI/HTML/PDF and evidence summarizer, but a full-stack scoring sweep is the right shape; mixing into a hotfix risks shipping new bugs
